transcript: Speaker A (AI): कल कहाँ गए थे? [Where did you go yesterday?] Speaker B (Human): I went to माल yesterday. Speaker A (AI): माल? प्रोनन्सिएशन थोड़ा गड़बड़ हो गया। It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. कल क्या खाया? [Mall? Pronunciation is a bit off. It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. What did you eat yesterday?] Speaker B (Human): I eat पीजा खाया। [I eat pizza.] Speaker A (AI): पीजा? नहीं, Pizza. और बात कल की है, इसलिए eat नहीं, ate. I ate pizza. ट्रेन कहाँ से पकड़ते हो? [Pizza? No, Pizza. And it's about yesterday, so not eat, ate. I ate pizza. Where do you catch the train from?] Speaker B (Human): I pick train from रेलवे स्टेशन। [I pick train from railway station.] Speaker A (AI): Pick? Pick मतलब उठाना। ट्रेन उठाओगे? Catch मतलब पकड़ना। और इस्टेशन नहीं, Station. I catch the train from the railway station. [Pick? Pick means to lift. Will you lift the train? Catch means to catch. And not 'istation', Station. I catch the train from the railway station.] Speaker B (Human): ओ, मेरा प्रोनन्सिएशन वीक है। [Oh, my pronunciation is weak.] Speaker A (AI): कोई बात नहीं। AI Teacher ट्राई किया क्या? [No problem. Did you try AI Teacher?] Speaker B (Human): वो महंगा होगा ना? [That must be expensive, right?] Speaker A (AI): बिल्कुल नहीं। नॉर्मल इंग्लिश क्लासेस से 7 गुना सस्ता है। इसलिए 50 लाख लोग MySivi पर प्रैक्टिस कर रहे हैं। [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing on MySivi.] Speaker B (Human): लेकिन टाइम नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.] Speaker A (AI): रोज़ सिर्फ 15-20 मिनट प्रैक्टिस काफी है। धीरे-धीरे कॉन्फिडेंट हो जाओगे। [Just 15-20 minutes of practice daily is enough. Gradually you will become confident.] Speaker B (Human): वाओ! कैसे ज्वाइन करूँ? [Wow! How do I join?] Speaker A (AI): नीचे इंस्टॉल का बटन दबाओ। MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करो, साइन अप करो और प्रैक्टिस शुरू करो। सिर्फ 15 दिनों में इम्प्रूवमेंट दिखने लगेगा। ट्रायल सिर्फ ₹1 में 3 दिनों के लिए है। अभी शुरू करो। [Press the install button below. Install MySivi app, sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Trial is for just ₹1 for 3 days. Start now.]
on_screen_text: कल कहाँ गए थे [Where did you go yesterday?], I went to माल yesterday, प्रोनन्सिएशन थोड़ा गड़बड़ हो गया [Pronunciation is a bit off], It is Mall, I went to the mall, कल क्या खाया [What did you eat yesterday?], I eat पीजा खाया [I eat pizza], पीजा [Pizza], नहीं Pizza! और बात कल की है इसलिए Eat नहीं Ate! [No Pizza! And it's about yesterday so not Eat, Ate!], Ate! I ate pizza!, ट्रेन कहाँ से पकड़ते हो? [Where do you catch the train from?], I pick train from रेलवे स्टेशन। [I pick train from railway station.], Pick, Pick मतलब उठाना [Pick means to lift], Catch मतलब पकड़ना [Catch means to catch], और इस्टेशन नहीं [And not 'istation'], Station! I catch the train from the railway station, MySivi, MySivi App इंस्टॉल करो [Install MySivi App]
summary: A young man on a train practices English with an AI avatar on the MySivi app, which corrects his pronunciation and grammar in real-time. The ad highlights the app's affordability, convenience, and a 3-day trial for just ₹1, urging viewers to install it.
